saas_dashboard.description: Data-dense SaaS surfaces. Stresses density handling, information hierarchy, and enterprise restraint.

prompts.prompt: Build a usage analytics dashboard for a serverless platform — showing requests per second, latency p50/p95/p99, cold-start counts, and error rate across 4 regions
Design a team admin panel for inviting members, assigning roles, and reviewing audit log entries
Build a billing overview page with current plan, usage vs quota, upcoming invoice preview, and payment method management
Design a CI/CD deploy history page with branch, commit, status, duration, and the ability to rerun or roll back
Build an API key management interface: create, rotate, scope, revoke. Show last-used, rate-limit, and expiration per key
Design a data pipeline observability view: DAG visualization of tasks, success/failure per node, retry counts, owner-per-task
Build a feature-flag management console with environments (dev/staging/prod), rollout percentages, targeting rules
Design a log-search interface with time-range picker, structured query builder, and result table with expand-for-full-context
Build a customer health score dashboard for a B2B SaaS CSM team — NPS, usage trajectory, support tickets, renewal date
Design a multi-tenant settings page with organization, workspace, and user-level preferences clearly separated

consumer_mobile.description: Mobile consumer apps. Stresses delight, dopamine calibration, and motion appropriateness.

prompts.prompt: Build a recipe discovery feed for a home-cooking app with save, share, and 'cook now' walkthrough mode
Design a habit-tracker mobile app's daily check-in screen — 3 habits to log, streak indicator, gentle celebration
Build a meditation app's library screen — tracks by mood, duration, instructor; downloadable for offline
Design a language-learning lesson interface with prompt, answer input, streak counter, and correct/incorrect feedback
Build a fitness app workout player — current exercise, set/rep counter, rest timer, and the next 3 exercises preview
Design a plant-care mobile app detail page — plant photo, watering schedule, care notes, and 'log watered' action
Build a budgeting app's month overview — income, fixed expenses, variable expenses, and remaining-to-spend
Design a gratitude journaling app's entry-compose screen with optional mood selector and 3-prompt guidance
Build a podcast player with queue, playback speed, sleep timer, and transcript toggle
Design a sleep-tracker morning recap — last night's stages, HR variability, sleep score, and 3-day trend

editorial.description: Long-form reading. Stresses typography, type scale, and reading experience.

prompts.prompt: Build a long-read article page for a tech magazine feature — 4000-word investigative piece with pull quotes, footnotes, images
Design a book-review page with star rating, multi-paragraph review body, related-reads sidebar
Build a personal blog's post template — author bio header, body with code snippets, comments section, related posts
Design a newsletter archive landing page — grid of past issues with dates, titles, and preview excerpts
Build a research paper viewer — multi-section academic layout with abstract, figures, references, BibTeX export
Design a recipe blog post with story intro, jump-to-recipe button, ingredient list, method with step numbers
Build a case-study detail page for a design studio's portfolio — problem, approach, outcome, credits
Design a lyrics/liner notes page for an album — scrollable lyrics synced to album art, credits below
Build a documentation page for a developer tool — ToC sidebar, body with code blocks, language switcher, edit-on-GitHub
Design a company 'annual review' one-page scroll-narrative with multiple sections, sparkline stats, and pull quotes

fintech_trust.description: Regulated / high-stakes finance. Stresses restraint, typography for legal copy, and anti-default bias (avoid the fintech-trust slop default).

prompts.prompt: Build a personal bank account overview with balance, transactions, monthly spending chart, and pay-bill shortcut — NOT the default generic blue/gradient fintech look
Design a stock trading position detail page — current price, intraday chart, holdings, and buy/sell action sheet
Build a wire transfer confirmation screen with recipient, amount, fees, and explicit risk/warning disclosures
Design a crypto wallet backup-phrase generation flow — the 24-word phrase with 'write it down' confirmation steps
Build a tax-year summary page for a freelancer — income categories, deductions, estimated tax, export-to-CPA
Design an investment portfolio rebalancing recommendation page — current vs. target allocation, suggested trades, expected impact
Build a loan application status page — steps completed, underwriter decision timeline, required documents
Design a retirement-calculator interactive page with sliders for contributions, expected return, and projected-balance graph
Build a fraud alert review screen — flagged transaction details, confirm/reject actions, and contact support path
Design a B2B invoicing dashboard — outstanding, paid, overdue; per-client AR aging; send-reminder action

creative_portfolio.description: Distinctive POV-driven creative work. The dimension where generic output is penalized hardest.

prompts.prompt: Build a personal portfolio site for a motion designer — must feel distinctive, not generic. Include project grid, about, and contact
Design a ceramicist's online shop — hero product reel, craft-warm aesthetic, purchase flow
Build a photographer's landing page — one hero image, subtle navigation, and a contact-form footer
Design a independent music label's site with roster, releases, tour dates, and a distinctive visual identity
Build an indie game studio's landing page — teaser video, devlog feed, platform availability, wishlist CTA
Design a literary magazine's website — issue archive, essay reader, donate/subscribe
Build a small architecture studio's site — projects grid with photography-first card layout, contact form
Design a florist's e-commerce catalog — seasonal arrangements, pickup vs. delivery, subscription option
Build a tattoo artist's portfolio — work grid, booking flow, studio info — must visually signal their aesthetic
Design an experimental poetry webzine's homepage with scrolling verse layout and archive navigation

accessibility_first.description: WCAG AAA and cognitive-a11y. Stresses the accessibility dimension at the highest difficulty.

prompts.prompt: Build a local-government benefits portal that must meet WCAG 2.2 AAA — application form, status check, contact
Design a high-contrast calendar scheduler optimized for users with low vision
Build a medication-reminder app interface for older users with large targets and clear typography
Design a dyslexia-friendly news reader — long-form articles with adjusted spacing and font
Build a calm/focus-mode checkout flow for an e-commerce site targeted at neurodivergent users
Design an educational-quiz interface with screen-reader-first semantic structure and keyboard-only completability
Build a crisis-line resource page with large, clear CTAs and zero cognitive-load chrome
Design an accessibility settings panel for a product — font-size, contrast, motion, audio-description toggles
Build an adult-education course player with closed captions, transcript, and speed controls
Design a voter-registration lookup tool meeting Section 508 + ADA Title II

multi_locale.description: Non-ASCII correctness, RTL, CJK. Stresses typography + i18n dimensions.

prompts.prompt: Bygg en svensk bokföringstjänst-landing med 'bokföring', 'fakturor', 'moms' — korrekta diakritiska tecken, latin-ext font subset
Build a Japanese restaurant homepage in 日本語 — vertical-cjk typography option, menu with kanji and romaji
Design an Arabic news site header and article page with RTL layout — 'الأخبار' heading, CSS logical properties throughout
Build a German fintech onboarding — 'Hauptkonto', 'Überweisung', 'Rückzahlung' with correct diacritics
Design a Hindi-language e-commerce product page in देवनागरी script — Devanagari font loaded, proper line-height
Build a Spanish travel-booking search page — 'búsqueda', 'habitación', 'aeropuerto' with ñ and é preserved
Design a Korean food-delivery app home — 한국어 menu categories, Hangul-safe font (Pretendard or Spoqa Han Sans)
Build a Hebrew news website with RTL layout and 'חדשות' headline
Design a Finnish outdoor-gear site — 'päällystakki', 'löydä lähin myymälä' with ä/ö preserved
Build a Simplified Chinese SaaS pricing page in 简体中文 — Noto Sans SC, correct punctuation (全角)

motion_marketing.description: Motion-forward marketing sites. Stresses motion readiness, reduced-motion safety, and WCAG 2.2.2.

prompts.prompt: Build a scroll-driven product landing page for a developer tool — hero with kinetic type, three feature sections revealed on scroll
Design an AI-startup landing page with motion-forward hero, subtle scroll-linked particle field, and clean CTA section
Build a SaaS changelog hero with kinetic timeline — entries reveal as user scrolls, each with its own micro-animation
Design a luxury-brand product page with silky scroll-linked reveal of product shots and specs
Build a headless-CMS landing with vibrant kinetic hero, 3-up feature cards, and customer logos marquee
Design a gaming-studio reveal page with cinematic scroll-timeline pacing and atmospheric background
Build a conference site hero with kinetic date/location reveal, speaker grid, and schedule
Design an e-commerce campaign landing with scroll-driven product-reveal choreography and checkout CTA
Build a design-agency case-study scroll-story with cinematic transitions between sections
Design a music festival lineup reveal page with scroll-linked artist-card entries and daily schedule

healthcare.description: Calm, clinical, informational. Stresses restraint, trust, and accessibility.

prompts.prompt: Build a patient portal dashboard — upcoming appointments, prescriptions, recent results, messages
Design a symptom-checker flow with empathetic, non-alarming language and clear next-steps
Build a telehealth waiting-room screen — appointment countdown, test audio/video, pre-visit questions
Design a mental-health check-in mobile screen with mood scale and follow-up prompts
Build a lab-results detail page — test name, value, reference range, visual indicator, doctor's note
Design a fertility-tracking app's cycle view — calm, non-judgmental, clear data
Build an immunization-record page with past shots, upcoming schedule, and printable certificate
Design a physical-therapy exercise routine player — video, rep counter, notes, progress
Build a hospice-care family-communication portal with updates from care team and family members
Design a pharmacy auto-refill dashboard — medications, refill schedule, pickup vs. delivery

transplantation.description: Cross-domain style transplantation. Unique to Visionary's algorithm — no competitor has a direct equivalent.

prompts.prompt: Build an accounting dashboard using the visual language of a 1970s newspaper broadsheet
Design a biotech startup homepage that looks like an Eames-era Herman Miller brochure
Build a warehouse logistics tracker styled like a Swiss Rationalist concert poster
Design a developer documentation site that reads like a letterpressed scientific journal
Build a wedding planning app with the visual warmth of a cottagecore zine
Design an AI dev tool's pricing page in the aesthetic of cassette-futurism (Alien Nostromo UI)
Build a HR onboarding flow styled after 1960s Italian Olivetti typewriter documentation
Design a children's-education app with the craft aesthetic of cut-paper picture-book illustrations
Build a legal-contract review tool visual-inspired by constructivist propaganda posters
Design a real-estate listing page with the elegance of a 1930s Art Deco hotel brochure
